allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import ai.prompts; print\('SYSTEM_PROMPT chars:', len\(ai.prompts.SYSTEM_PROMPT\)\); print\('BATCH_SYSTEM_PROMPT chars:', len\(ai.prompts.BATCH_SYSTEM_PROMPT\)\); print\('_SINGLE_OUTPUT_SECTION starts with:', repr\(ai.prompts._SINGLE_OUTPUT_SECTION[:40]\)\); sp = ai.prompts.get_system_prompt\(\); print\('single prompt ends with:', repr\(sp[-60:]\)\); bp = ai.prompts.get_system_prompt\(batch=True\); print\('batch prompt ends with:', repr\(bp[-60:]\)\); print\('OK'\)")
